title: 10 Things a Godly Man Kills Before They Kill Him
caption:
Scripture doesn't say manage what's killing you. It says put it to death.

Some of what's running your life isn't obvious. It looks like discernment, it looks like being "just wired that way," it looks like passion. It's still the thing costing you.

Put to death therefore whatever in you is earthly. (Colossians 3:5)

Here are 10 things worth killing before they finish the job on you.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #selfcontrol
